title: rubus × luteipetalus
intro: Rubus × luteipetalus is a hybrid species of flowering plant, resulting from the cross between Rubus occidentalis and Rubus idaeus. It is also known as the yellow-petaled raspberry or golden raspberry. The plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, particularly in its ability to exhibit antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Rubus × luteipetalus include its potential to reduce oxidative stress, alleviate gastrointestinal issues, and support cardiovascular health, and it can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions for consumption.
